summary: Frontend-only verification of the new pill-based FilterBar (DateRange/Compare/Currency pills + MobileFiltersSheet), URL query-param persistence, and Overview page section reordering. All 14 acceptance items from the review request passed on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). No regressions observed on Customers/Products/Inventory/Locations/Footfall filter bars.

issues: Recharts emits 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warnings at initial mount (noisy but non-breaking). Likely from chart containers measuring before layout settles — consider adding minWidth/minHeight on ResponsiveContainer parents.

verifications.login: admin@vivofashiongroup.com logged in and landed on /
verifications.pills_render: date-range-pill, compare-pill, currency-pill all found in filter-bar with labels Today / No comparison / KES
verifications.date_range_panel: Opens on click, data-testid='date-range-panel' visible, all 15 presets (today/yesterday/last_7d/last_30d/last_90d/last_365d/last_week/last_month/last_quarter/last_12_months/last_year/mtd/qtd/ytd/custom) present
verifications.preset_click: Clicking preset-last_7d updated pill label to 'Last 7 days', closed panel, URL became ?p=last_7d&d=2026-04-21&t=2026-04-27, KPIs refreshed
verifications.url_persistence: Full reload restored 'Last 7 days' preset and same URL
verifications.compare_panel: compare-panel opens with exactly the 5 options (none, yesterday, last_year, last_year_dow, custom). Selecting custom reveals compare-custom-from, compare-custom-to, compare-custom-apply
verifications.currency_disabled: currency-pill is disabled=True (not clickable); tooltip 'Multi-currency coming soon — KES locked for now' wired via shadcn Tooltip
verifications.last_refreshed: 'Last refreshed: 12:54:11 PM' label rendered via data-testid='last-refreshed'
verifications.section_order: Confirmed top→bottom vertical order on Overview: Total Sales/Net Sales/Orders/Units → ABV/ASP/MSI/Return Rate/Return Amount → Total Footfall/Conversion Rate → Top Country/Top Location/Best Conversion → Top locations chart + Country split → Daily Sales Trend (between y=903 and y=2151) → Sales by Category (y=2151) → Sales by Subcategory (y=2598) → Top 20 Styles (y=3125) → 'Insights & Projections' divider (y=4331) → Daily Briefing / WhatChanged / WinsThisWeek / StoreOfTheWeek / SalesProjection / Data Freshness (y=4917)
verifications.other_pages: Customers, Products, Inventory, Locations, Footfall all render the 3-pill FilterBar + share-filter-link correctly
verifications.mobile_viewport: At 390x844 the three desktop pills are hidden and replaced by mobile-filters-button; clicking opens mobile-filters-sheet containing all three pills (date/compare/currency) + country/POS multiselects
verifications.share_view: share-filter-link clickable on desktop; share-filter-link-mobile rendered on mobile

action_items: Non-blocking: suppress or fix Recharts 'width(-1) / height(-1)' warnings at mount — guard ResponsiveContainer with a minHeight or skip render until container has measured dimensions.
critical_code_review_comments: FilterBar.jsx (~580 LOC) is borderline but still cohesive — fine as-is; if it grows, split DateRangeButton / CompareButton / CurrencyButton into their own files under components/filterbar/.

filters.jsx URL writer treats preset!=='today' as the emit-trigger for d/t, but also emits d/t when preset==='today' if they differ from defaults — this is correct but subtle; consider a comment or unit test to lock the behavior.
VALID_COMPARE still contains legacy 'last_month' even though the new UI no longer exposes it — harmless (URL-only backward compat) but worth a comment.
Currency button disabled state: aria-disabled/title would improve a11y in addition to the shadcn Tooltip.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter bar refactor (iteration_31) verified end-to-end — all 14 acceptance items pass. If next iteration touches filters/URL params, regression selectors: data-testid='date-range-pill' | 'compare-pill' | 'currency-pill' | 'date-range-panel' | 'compare-panel' | 'preset-<key>' | 'compare-option-<key>' | 'compare-custom-from/to/apply' | 'mobile-filters-button' | 'mobile-filters-sheet' | 'share-filter-link' | 'last-refreshed'. URL short-key scheme: p/d/t/co/ch/cm/cd/ce/cu; long aliases period/date_from/date_to/country/pos/compare/compare_from/compare_to/currency are accepted for shared links.
